channel.title: MClimate – Blog Monitor
channel.description: Auto-generated feed tracking new posts on mclimate.eu/blogs/blog

item.title: MCLIMATE ANNOUNCES NEW PARTNERSHIP WITH VIBOO
item.description: MCLIMATE ANNOUNCES NEW PARTNERSHIP WITH VIBOO Jan 29, 2026 SOFIA, January 28, 2026 - MClimate JSC today announced that the firm has started a new strategic partnership with the Swiss company viboo AG, an AI-based software company providing predictive heating control and digital energy management for existing infrastructure. Bridging Hardware and AI to Make Buildings Smarter TogetherThe partnershi
